div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%
div.p: Profiles: CRMI Shareable CodeSystem, CRMI Publishable CodeSystem
This case-sensitive code system https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/CRTopographyCS defines the following codes:

tr.td: Overlapping lesion of floor of mouth (048)
Overlapping lesion of other and unspecified parts of mouth (068)
Overlapping lesion of major salivary glands (088)
Overlapping lesion of lip, oral cavity and pharynx (148)
Overlapping lesion of rectum, anus and anal canal (218)
Overlapping lesion of heart, mediastinum and pleura (388)
Overlapping lesion of respiratory system and intrathoracic organs (398)
Long bones of upper limb, scapula and associated joints (400)
Short bones of upper limb and associated joints (401)
Long bones of lower limb and associated joints (402)
Short bones of lower limb and associated joints (403)
Overlapping lesion of bones, joints and articular cartilage of limbs (408)
Bones of skull and face and associated joints (410)
Rib, sternum, clavicle and associated joints (413)
Pelvic bones, sacrum, coccyx and associated joints (414)
Overlapping lesion of bones, joints and articular cartilage (418)
Skin of other and unspecified parts of face (443)
Skin of upper limb and shoulder (446)
Skin of lower limb and hip (447)
Peripheral nerves and autonomic nervous system of head, face, and neck (470)
Peripheral nerves and autonomic nervous system of upper limb and shoulder (471)
Peripheral nerves and autonomic nervous system of lower limb and hip (472)
Peripheral nerves and autonomic nervous system of thorax (473)
Peripheral nerves and autonomic nervous system of abdomen (474)
Peripheral nerves and autonomic nervous system of pelvis (475)
Peripheral nerves and autonomic nervous system of trunk, NOS (476)
Overlapping lesion of peripheral nerves and autonomic nervous system (478)
Overlapping lesion of retroperitoneum and peritoneum (488)
Connective, Subcutaneous and other soft tissues of head, face, and neck (490)
Connective, Subcutaneous and other soft tissues of upper limb and shoulder (491)
Connective, Subcutaneous and other soft tissues of lower limb and hip (492)
Connective, Subcutaneous and other soft tissues of thorax (493)
Connective, Subcutaneous and other soft tissues of abdomen (494)
Connective, Subcutaneous and other soft tissues of pelvis (495)
Connective, Subcutaneous and other soft tissues of trunk, NOS (496)
Overlapping lesion of connective, subcutaneous and other soft tissues (498)
Connective, Subcutaneous and other soft tissues, NOS (499)
Other specified parts of female genital organs (577)
Overlapping lesion of female genital organs (578)
Other specified parts of male genital organs (637)
Overlapping lesion of male genital organs (638)
Overlapping lesion of eye and adnexa (698)
Overlapping lesion of brain and central nervous system (728)
Overlapping lesion of endocrine glands and related structures (758)
Lymph nodes of head, face and neck (770)
Lymph nodes of axilla or arm (773)
Lymph nodes of inguinal region or leg (774)

description.value: ICD-O-3 topography codes mapped from the CanReg5 topography dictionary (topography.tsv). These codes represent the anatomical site of the tumour origin. The topography field is implemented as a dependent dropdown list filtered by the selected Site. Codes must not be modified as they are mapped directly to CanReg5 standards and used in multiple data quality checks.
